title: Fashion Friday with Flamingos on the Beach
excerpt: One of the best parts of living in Southern California is that a little beach getaway sometimes simply means taking a little break from work instead of missing a whole entire day of it. The accessibility of being able to…
body:
One of the best parts of living in Southern California is that a little beach getaway sometimes simply means taking a little break from work instead of missing a whole entire day of it. The accessibility of being able to drive just 15 minutes to a beach to spend less than an hour there is something I do not take for granted. On days or weeks when there is just so much going on, escaping just for a little time by the ocean can do wonders. Cents of Style sent over this Classic Flamingo Beach Blanket, and I couldn't think of anything better than to take a little break from a hectic day/week/month/year for some time on the sand.

The beach blanket/wrap is lightweight and lovely. It was hard choosing from all the awesome prints, but I figured you could never go wrong with some flamingos! Plus, through the weekend, the round towels are just $21.95 with the code: STORYTHROW (sorry for the correction - the beach wraps are $15.95 using the same code).

Some of the links above are affiliate links. I receive a small percentage of sales at no cost to you. My creative partners and I really appreciate your continued support and every little bit helps me to bring you consistent content!
